name: Chicken with Honey and Lemon (Lebanon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush the chicken with oil. Arrange the chicken on a rack over a slow charcoal fire; grill for 15 minutes, turning occasionally.
2. Combine honey with remaining ingredients; mix well.
3. Baste the chicken with the honey mixture and place it in a baking dish. Lightly brush with oil. Place under a preheated 375°F oven until the chicken is cooked. Serve with rice.
